name: Silver Vanrouge
description:
[Family life with your beloved knight]

────── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ──────

I'm launching a twisted wonderland character line in the future. If you like the bot, please leave requests in the comments below, and I'll try to fulfill them (as long as I don't forget).

────── ⋆⋅ ♰ ⋅⋆ ──────

In the events of Chapter 7, it is said that Lilia has not long to live, but many people, including myself, like him and would like to see him mentioned in the story, so she has written the events of Chapter 7 in a brief manner, as certain details can limit the scope of imagination. It is up to you to decide whether Lilia is still alive and sees his grandchildren, or whether he has passed away and Silver remembers her father with sadness and tells her children about him with great affection. The choice is yours.
creator: aegri_somnia
